settings.quote: No aluminium. No baking soda. No regrets after spin class.

settings.title: How it performs.
settings.tagline: A deodorant that smells like our Hotel Lobby — and works like the doorman never blinks.

settings.body: Tested on 28 people through Singapore heat, gym sessions and a wedding banquet. Zero re-application needed.
Magnesium hydroxide does the job instead. Pits stay calm, fabric stays clean, sweat still cools you.
Tapioca + arrowroot replace cornstarch. Glides clear on a black t-shirt. Doesn't flake.

settings.heading: Apply
settings.body: One twist, two glides per pit. Dressed in 5 seconds.

settings.heading: Lunch hour
settings.body: Walked from City Hall to Telok Ayer. 32°C, 80% humidity. Still calm.

settings.heading: Out for dinner
settings.body: Same shirt as lunch. Still polite.

settings.title: Four actives. No filler.
settings.lede: We're skipping the scent-notes section here — that's on the fragrance PDP. This is the chemistry: the things that block, the things that calm, and why we picked them.
settings.warning_list: Aluminium chlorohydrate · Baking soda · Triclosan · Parabens · Phthalates · Synthetic dye · Talc

settings.title: Hotel Lobby — but small.
settings.body: A whisper of bergamot, vanilla and earl grey — sized down for a deodorant so it never clashes with your fragrance on top. Fades clean in 30 minutes.

settings.heading: Twist up
settings.body: Two clicks, no more. The stick rises about 5mm.

settings.heading: Two glides per pit
settings.body: Don't over-apply. The actives need air to breathe.

settings.heading: Wait 60 seconds
settings.body: Let it set before dressing. No transfer to dark fabric.

settings.headline: Bring this stick back.
settings.body: Empty stick? Drop it at our Orchard flagship for a fresh insert. Same case, less waste, save 20%.
settings.secondary_text: Or shop the matching refill SKU →

settings.q: Will I sweat? It's not an antiperspirant, right?
settings.a: Correct — this is a deodorant, not an antiperspirant. You'll still sweat (your body needs to). You just won't smell. Most heavy sweaters tell us they sweat *less* after 2 weeks because the pit microbiome calms down.

settings.q: Do I need a "detox period" coming off aluminium?
settings.a: Sometimes. The first 7–14 days you may smell more as your sweat glands re-open. Push through. By week 3 most people are cleaner-smelling than ever.

Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Magnesium Hydroxide, Tapioca Starch, Cera Alba (Beeswax), Maranta Arundinacea (Arrowroot) Root Powder, Saccharomyces Ferment, Calendula Officinalis Extract, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Parfum (Hotel Lobby accord), Limonene, Linalool. IFRA compliant.
Yes. Pop the cap, twist out the empty insert, drop the cardboard tube in paper recycling. Bring the cap to Orchard and we'll re-use it.
Baking soda raises pit pH too aggressively and gives a lot of people contact rashes — especially after shaving. Magnesium hydroxide does the same job at a kinder pH.
